text_excerpt: Contact Hilary - Hilary Benn - Labour MP for Leeds South Skip to main content Hilary Benn - Labour MP for Leeds South Join Get Involved Donate News from Hilary Contact Hilary Contact your Labour Councillors About Hilary Leeds South Privacy Policy Hilary’s Parliamentary Activity Office Standards Policy More Search Search the website Search Menu Contact Hilary Hilary Benn - Labour MP for Leeds South Address Roundhay Road, Leeds LS7 1AB, UK View on Google Maps Telephone 0113 2441097 Email [email protected] You can contact Hilary… If you would like to raise a personal or local issue please write to Hilary at: Unity Business Centre 26 Roundhay Road Leeds LS7 1AB Or telephone: 0113 244 1097 By email [email protected] Hilary Benn - Labour MP for Leeds South Contact details Roundhay Road, Leeds LS7 1AB, UK View on Google Maps Email: [email protected] Further details Promoted by Hollie Ridley on behalf of Hilary Benn at 20 Rushworth Street, London SE1 0SS ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved.
